summary:
Aspiring Master Level AI/ML Engineer (Data Science, NLP, Business Analysis) with a robust academic foundation and practical project experience.
Proficient in developing scalable Machine Learning and Deep Learning models using Python, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
Eager to apply Generative AI, LLMs (Gemini), and Transformers for advanced Natural Language Processing and contextual document summarization.
Ready to architect MLOps-driven solutions, translating business analysis into quantifiable impact and driving workflow automation.

bullet_points: Architected an end-to-end analytics system for MSME operations, reducing manual processing errors by 90% via automated tracking and validation workflows.
Developed predictive revenue modeling using regression and customer behavioral clustering, yielding a 20% retention increase and 35% monthly revenue growth.
Streamlined ETL pipelines and cloud-based document automation for structured data storage, accelerating data retrieval by 40% for critical business analysis.
Processed 1.5M+ agricultural data points using Python and Pandas to identify crop production patterns across 646 districts.
Designed Power BI dashboards to visualize multi-year crop trends, highlighting state-wise and seasonal yield variations for 4 major crops.
Generated analytical reports detailing post-2010 yield declines, identifying key optimization opportunities for increased agricultural productivity by 15%.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Engineered a secure order management system with FastAPI and Supabase, automating invoice and document workflows, reducing errors by 90%.
Deployed predictive revenue modeling and customer segmentation using Scikit-learn, migrating data to Postgres, increasing repeat orders by 15%.
Integrated a Generative AI 'Business Analyst' using Gemini to convert raw metrics into insights, decreasing executive reporting time by 70%.

projects.name: AI Stock News Sentiment
bullet_points: Developed an autonomous NLP engine monitoring 3 live financial news streams, utilizing spaCy for Entity Identification (NER) with 100% accuracy.
Deployed a FinBERT NLP pipeline for contextual sentiment analysis on financial news, enabling high-precision market signal detection.
Constructed a high-performance analytics dashboard using Streamlit and FastAPI, visualizing sentiment distribution and time-series trends for 3 major indices.

projects.name: FaceGeo Attendance System
bullet_points: Orchestrated a secure Flask and Supabase platform, integrating Facial Recognition and Geo-fencing for fraud-proof, real-time validation check-ins with 99% accuracy.
Established role-based dashboards enabling attendance tracking and administrative controls, streamlining workflows for over 100 users across 5 distinct zones.
Fortified operational reliability by implementing location-bound validation and instant face matching, reducing manual attendance adjustments by 80% weekly.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence
